section.title: Key Words
section.para: The key words "MUST", "MUST NOT", "REQUIRED", "SHALL", "SHALL NOT", "SHOULD", "SHOULD NOT", "RECOMMENDED", "MAY", and "OPTIONAL" in this document are to be interpreted as described in [RFC2119].

section.title: Typographical Conventions
section.para: XML element names are shown enclosed in angle brackets, for example <unit>. XML attribute names are shown in fixed-width type without brackets, for example id. XML namespace prefixes used in examples (xlf:, mtc:, pvn:) follow the conventions established in [XLIFF-2.3-part2] and the XLIFF 2.3 Provenance module. Example XML is shown in fenced code blocks and is illustrative; it is not necessarily complete or schema-valid.
